prompt:
Healer — brief monitoring check (research-complete mode as of 2026-03-17 19:01 UTC):

**Status:** Aion brief is RESEARCH-COMPLETE (Keter declared). No further active research needed.

**Your standing tasks:**
1) **Episodic memory**: Capture new episodes if significant events have occurred since your last check. Use: bash ~/blum/scripts/capture-episode.sh "title" "summary"

2) **New legal sources (monitoring only)**: Flag ONLY if genuinely novel material appears re: AI legal personhood, MSA 2015, Scottish Parliament AI strategy, or D(UA)A report publication. Do NOT report sources already in the brief (GAP-L05 through GAP-L07, GAP-P06 are committed — Law Commission, D(UA)A, UKJT, EFW Committee).

3) **D(UA)A monitoring**: The UK Government missed its 18 March 2026 statutory deadline. If the report at https://www.gov.uk/government/publications/copyright-and-artificial-intelligence-progress-report shows a new document, that is high-priority. Check the page update date.

If nothing new: one-line status only. No full reports needed.
